title: Elsevier Publication Workflow in a Digital Library Network
description: A visual representation of how academic content from Elsevier flows through a computer network to reach end-users within a university or research institution.
relationships: 1. Client requests journal article -> 2. Request routed through firewall -> 3. Proxy server authenticates subscription -> 4. Request forwarded to Elsevier server -> 5. Content retrieved and sent back through chain to client
